name: Arcana Force V - The Hierophant
name_jp: アルカナフォース<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ⅴ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ファイブ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＴＨＥ ＨＩＥＲＯＰＨＡＮＴ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ザ・ハイエロファント</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
You can discard this card; this turn, your opponent cannot activate cards or effects when an "Arcana Force" monster(s) is Summoned to your field. If this card is Summoned: Toss a coin.
● Heads: Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Arcana Force" monster from your Deck with a different name from the monsters you control and in your GY.
● Tails: Special Summon 1 "Arcana Force" monster from your Deck to your opponent's field.
mnst_eff:
You can discard this card; this turn, your opponent cannot activate cards or effects when an "Arcana Force" monster(s) is Summoned to your field. If this card is Summoned: Toss a coin.
● Heads: Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Arcana Force" monster from your Deck with a different name from the monsters you control and in your GY.
● Tails: Special Summon 1 "Arcana Force" monster from your Deck to your opponent's field.
eff:

mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons from your Deck to your opponent's field
